name: CLIENT: VoomLux — lead capture + auto follow-up

parameters.content:
## VoomLux lead machine
Leads come from tbsol.net/clients/voomlux (or any form posting to this webhook).

What happens automatically:
1. VoomLux gets an instant lead alert (you're CC'd)
2. The lead gets an instant "got it" reply
3. 2 days later the lead gets a friendly follow-up nudge

### Setup
1. Replace CLIENT_EMAIL_HERE in the two marked nodes with VoomLux's real email.
2. Attach your email credential on all 3 Email nodes.
3. Save → flip **Active**.

Lead page to give the client: https://tbsol.net/clients/voomlux

parameters.subject: =🔥 New VoomLux lead: {{ $json.body.name }} — {{ $json.body.service }}
=Got your request, {{ $json.body.name }} ✅ — VoomLux
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.name }},

Thanks for reaching out to VoomLux! We got your request:

Service: {{ $json.body.service }}
Vehicle: {{ $json.body.vehicle }}

We'll get back to you shortly with your quote and available times. If it's urgent, just reply to this email.

Talk soon,
The VoomLux Team

parameters.subject: =Still want that quote, {{ $json.body.name }}? — VoomLux
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.body.name }},

Just circling back on your {{ $json.body.service }} request — spots fill up, and we'd love to get your {{ $json.body.vehicle || 'vehicle' }} taken care of.

Reply to this email or give us a call and we'll lock in a time that works.

— The VoomLux Team
(If you've already booked or changed your mind, no worries — just ignore this!)
